description: A lightly designed arrest photo: a candid color photograph with an added ICE branding overlay in the lower-left corner. The photo shows a smiling young man with short dark hair and a beard, wearing a gray zip-up hoodie over a black graphic t-shirt, standing with hands apparently restrained behind his back between two officers seen from behind. The left officer wears a tactical vest with 'FBI' in yellow on the back; the right officer wears a vest marked 'POLICE' with an 'AR' (Air & Marine / arrest team) patch and a ball cap. A chain-link and white picket fence with trees is in the background. Overlaid graphics: the DHS seal and a white 'ICE' wordmark at lower left, a 'LEARN MORE' button in white on a blue underline, and the URL 'ICE.gov/newsroom' beneath. Per the tweet this is a criminal Brazilian national and confirmed gang member arrested in Bellingham, Mass., with FBI/DEA/ATF assistance. The faces are not blurred. The added agency branding and call-to-action make this a designed promotional graphic, though built on a single candid photo rather than an elaborate meme layout.
notable_text: ICE; LEARN MORE; ICE.gov/newsroom; FBI; POLICE
